name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve AWBlazorApp
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 130, Edge 130]
- **.NET SDK version:** [e.g., 10.0.100]
- **SQL Server instance:** [e.g., ELITE]
- **Database:** [e.g., AdventureWorks2022_dev]

## Logs

Paste any relevant log output from the console or Serilog output.

```
(paste logs here)
```

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., does it only happen in dark mode, only on certain pages, only with certain roles).
